name: io.github.major7apps/pensyve
title: Pensyve
description: Universal memory runtime for AI agents — episodic, semantic, and procedural memory.

tools.name: pensyve_recall
tools.description: Search memories using hybrid semantic + BM25 fusion with RRF ranking

tools.name: pensyve_remember
tools.description: Store a fact about a named entity as semantic memory

tools.name: pensyve_episode_start
tools.description: Begin tracking an interaction episode with named participants

tools.name: pensyve_episode_end
tools.description: Close an episode and extract memories

tools.name: pensyve_forget
tools.description: Delete all memories for an entity

tools.name: pensyve_inspect
tools.description: List all memories stored for an entity

tools.name: pensyve_status
tools.description: Namespace info, memory counts, and connection health
